Estimated testing time 1m (5 benchmarks x 12s). Change using '-quota'.

│ [mina_base.foo] some_test                │  12.34us │    45.6kc │   1.00w │    0.00w │   0.00w  │
│ [mina_base.bar] another_test             │  500.0ns │     2.5kc │   3.50w │    1.00w │   2.00w  │
